title: The Seraphim Turn the Battlefield
description: On pages 8–10, this part focuses on Sanji, Unknown person #7, Shaka, Unknown person #8, Luffy, Unknown person #9 as CP0 attacks Egghead, Seraphim enter the conflict, Stussy betrays CP0, Kuma moves toward the Red Line, and Vegapunk’s escape plan collapses.
scene: CP0 attacks Egghead, Seraphim enter the conflict, Stussy betrays CP0, Kuma moves toward the Red Line, and Vegapunk’s escape plan collapses.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: What the hell are these? explain!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Shaka! I put seastone on Lucci and Kaku.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Thank you Stussy. We are leaving the island you should come too.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Hey your just adding more people!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Hey Bonney where did you go?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Old man punk?? Where did that old man go?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Sorry you guys had to go through all that.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They said they wanna take away whitebeard's treasure!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Stay still and there won't be any casualties.

summary: This part advances the Egghead Under Siege through 32 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
